intro: Cycloloma, also known as prairie dock, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Cycloloma include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
